summary_text: Top predictors of views_public: segment_count (r=+0.39), new_speaker_rate (r=-0.38), avg_turn_duration_s (r=+0.38). LASSO-stable for views_public: thumb_brightness, thumb_contrast_rms, new_speaker_rate. Top predictors of retention_30s: ms_llm_loop_completeness (r=-0.29), shareability_score (r=-0.29), loop_quality_score (r=-0.28). Top predictors of engagement_like_ratio: turns_per_minute (r=+0.18), segment_count (r=-0.18), avg_turn_duration_s (r=-0.18). LASSO-stable for engagement_like_ratio: comment_sentiment_mean, comment_avg_length. Top predictors of engagement_comment_ratio: thumb_brightness (r=-0.27), thumb_contrast_rms (r=-0.25), ms_topic_coherence_scale_var (r=-0.21). LASSO-stable for engagement_comment_ratio: thumb_brightness, thumb_colorfulness, thumb_contrast_rms, share_intent_score, comment_avg_length, escalation_sentiment, peaks_per_minute, ms_topic_coherence_scale_var. Top predictors of engagement_overall_ratio: ms_llm_escalation_across_loops (r=-0.17), avg_turn_duration_s (r=-0.17), segment_count (r=-0.17). LASSO-stable for engagement_overall_ratio: comment_sentiment_mean, comment_avg_length. Top predictors of outlier_potential: pitch_mean (r=+0.30), pitch_std (r=+0.26), thumb_contrast_rms (r=-0.18). Top predictors of outlier_spike_score: pitch_mean (r=+0.30), thumb_contrast_rms (r=-0.21), ms_emotional_intensity_mean_scale_var (r=-0.19). Top predictors of outlier_retention_score: thumb_contrast_rms (r=+0.21), character_depth_score (r=-0.20), peak_spacing_cv (r=-0.20). LASSO-stable for outlier_retention_score: thumb_colorfulness, thumb_center_weight, thumb_contrast_rms, thumb_edge_density, cliffhanger_score, question_exchange_rate. Top predictors of ret_baseline: peak_spacing_cv (r=-0.25), thumb_center_weight (r=-0.19), moment_impact_score (r=-0.18). LASSO-stable for ret_baseline: thumb_brightness, thumb_colorfulness, thumb_center_weight, thumb_contrast_rms, thumb_face_count, thumb_edge_density, segment_count, cliffhanger_score, peak_spacing_cv, question_exchange_rate. Top predictors of ret_30s: wpm (r=+0.23), peak_spacing_cv (r=-0.22), topic_shift_count (r=-0.21). LASSO-stable for ret_30s: thumb_brightness, thumb_sharpness, thumb_edge_density, comment_question_rate, cliffhanger_score. Top predictors of ret_spike_count: ms_sentiment_range_scale_var (r=-0.19), dominant_speaker_sentiment_std (r=-0.19), ms_sentiment_range_max (r=-0.18). Top predictors of ret_max_spike: wpm (r=-0.28), loop_quality_score (r=+0.17), dominant_speaker_sentiment_std (r=-0.16). Top predictors of ret_stability: levity_intensity_ratio (r=+0.31), segment_count (r=+0.29), turns_per_minute (r=-0.29). LASSO-stable for ret_stability: thumb_contrast_rms. Top predictors of ret_end_ratio: levity_intensity_ratio (r=+0.29), avg_sentence_length (r=-0.25), loop_quality_score (r=+0.25). LASSO-stable for ret_end_ratio: thumb_brightness, levity_intensity_ratio. Top predictors of ret_initial_drop: pitch_std (r=-0.25), pitch_mean (r=-0.23), excitement_peaks (r=+0.21). Top predictors of ret_above_50_pct: peak_spacing_cv (r=-0.28), reveal_event_count (r=-0.19), ms_reveal_density_max (r=-0.19). LASSO-stable for ret_above_50_pct: thumb_center_weight, thumb_contrast_rms, thumb_face_count, thumb_edge_density, segment_count, peak_spacing_cv, question_exchange_rate.
